jsonLd.title: Mid-Level SEO Specialist at Voylla
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Voylla in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Voylla:
Voylla is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voylla!
